events.title: Opening Ceremony
events.panelDescription: Welcome to FakeCon Spring 2026! Join us for the kickoff.

events.title: Voice Acting 101
events.panelDescription: Learn the basics of voice acting from industry professionals.

events.title: Cosplay Contest
events.panelDescription: Show off your best cosplay! Prizes for top 3 in each category.

events.title: Anime Trivia Night
events.panelDescription: Test your anime knowledge against other fans!

events.title: Manga Drawing Workshop
events.panelDescription: Hands-on manga drawing workshop for beginners and intermediate artists.

events.title: Industry Panel: Future of Streaming
events.panelDescription: Industry leaders discuss the future of anime streaming platforms.

events.title: AMV Showcase
events.panelDescription: Watch the best AMVs submitted by our community.

events.title: Closing Ceremony
events.panelDescription: Thank you for attending FakeCon Spring 2026! See you next year!

events.title: Fan Art Gallery
events.panelDescription: Browse amazing fan art from talented community artists.
